meta.nutrition: 2.0 g/kg protein, carbs flex by phase

paceRef.notes: Build to Z3 in final miles

macros.carbNote: Lift day — fuel the session. Moderate-high starch.

meals.text: ~45g protein + 50g carbs: oats + whey + fruit
~45g protein: chicken + rice + veg
~25g protein: Greek yogurt + granola
~45g protein + 30g casein: lean meat + potato + greens + casein shake

exercises.name: Box Jumps (step down, reset each rep)
exercises.note: POWER FIRST. Quality only — never chase fatigue.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: Main strength lift. Heavy but leave 2–3 in the tank.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise (heavy)
exercises.note: Plantarflexor strength. Full stretch at bottom.

macros.carbNote: Hard session — maximize glycogen. Carb-forward dinner tonight.

meals.text: ~45g protein + 60–80g carbs: oats + whey + berries, or eggs + toast + smoothie
~45g protein: chicken (200g) + 2 cups rice + veg + olive oil
~25g protein: Greek yogurt + granola + honey
~45g protein + 30g casein: salmon/beef + potato + greens + casein shake

exercises.name: Lateral Raises (cable or DB)
exercises.note: Capped shoulders. Last set to failure.

exercises.name: Triceps Pushdown (cable or overhead DB)
exercises.note: Elbows pinned. Last set to failure.
